2603.18382.title: From Weak Cues to Real Identities: Evaluating Inference-Driven De-Anonymization in LLM Agents
2603.18382.paper_summary: Anonymization is widely treated as a practical safeguard because re-identifying anonymous records was historically costly, requiring domain expertise, tailored algorithms, and manual corroboration. We study a growing privacy risk that may weaken this barrier: LLM-based agents can autonomously reconstruct real-world identities from scattered, individually non-identifying cues. By combining these sparse cues with public information, agents resolve identities without bespoke engineering. We formalize this threat as \emph{inference-driven linkage} and systematically evaluate it across three settings: classical linkage scenarios (Netflix and AOL), \emph{InferLink} (a controlled benchmark varying task intent, shared cues, and attacker knowledge), and modern text-rich artifacts. Without task-specific heuristics, agents successfully execute both fixed-pool matching and open-ended identity resolution. In the Netflix Prize setting, an agent reconstructs 79.2\% of identities, significantly outperforming a 56.0\% classical baseline. Furthermore, linkage emerges not only under explicit adversarial prompts but also as a byproduct of benign cross-source analysis in \emph{InferLink} and unstructured research narratives. These findings establish that identity inference -- not merely explicit information disclosure -- must be treated as a first-class privacy risk; evaluations must measure what identities an agent can infer.
2603.18382.paper_summary_zh: 匿名化被廣泛視為一種實用的保護措施，因為重新識別匿名記錄在歷史上是昂貴的，需依賴領域專業知識、量身定制的算法和人工驗證。<lb/>我們研究了一個日益增長的隱私風險，這可能削弱這一障礙：基於LLM的代理可以自主從分散的、單獨不具識別性的線索中重建現實世界的身份。<lb/>通過將這些稀疏的線索與公共信息結合，代理能夠在沒有定制工程的情況下解決身份問題。<lb/>我們將這一威脅形式化為\emph{推理驅動的連結}，並在三個場景中系統性地評估它：經典連結場景（Netflix和AOL）、\emph{InferLink}（一個受控基準，變化任務意圖、共享線索和攻擊者知識）以及現代文本豐富的文獻。<lb/>在沒有特定任務啟發式的情況下，代理成功執行了固定池匹配和開放式身份解析。<lb/>在Netflix獎項設定中，一個代理重建了79.2\%的身份，顯著超過56.0\%的經典基準。<lb/>此外，連結不僅在明確的對抗性提示下出現，還作為\emph{InferLink}和非結構化研究敘述中良性跨源分析的副產品出現。<lb/>這些發現確立了身份推理——而不僅僅是明確的信息披露——必須被視為一級隱私風險；評估必須衡量代理可以推斷出哪些身份。
2603.18382.author: Myeongseob Ko et.al.
2603.18382.authors: Myeongseob Ko, Jihyun Jeong, Sumiran Singh Thakur, Gyuhak Kim, Ruoxi Jia
